title: 30% off any plan - for 6 months!
description: Tavily MCP Server - you can get 30% off for 6 months on any pre-paid plan of your choice. Plans range from 4,000 credits per month to 100,000 credits per month, and include email support and higher rate limits.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
